title: Sugar doubles
description: A recreation of the datapack used in NewKiddo’s “sugar doubles” series
body:
# Sugar doubles
> **You MUST be playing in hardcore mode.**

Starting with a goal of 1 sugar on day one, you'll have to consume items containing sugar everyday, with the goal doubling each time.
*All items are consumed automaticaly, you don't have to eat them by hand !*

### Items are :
- Fermented spider eye : 1 sugar
- Pumpkin pie : 1 sugar
- Cake : 2 sugar
- Honey bottle : 3 sugar.
